name: eresus-deser-audit
description: Deserialization vulnerability audit skill with gadget chain knowledge for all major languages. Trigger when the user asks to: "audit deserialization", "check for insecure deserialization", "find pickle vulnerabilities", "Marshal.load audit", "gadget chain analysis", "check for unsafe YAML loading", or when reviewing code that processes serialized data (JSON with type info, YAML, XML, binary formats).
